metadata.units: tonnes CO2 per MWh of generation

source.NG: EPA eGRID 2023 national gas (CC + simple-cycle weighted, ~80% CC)
source.OTH: Conservative weighted estimate for biomass + landfill + waste mix
source.clean: Zero direct emissions for NUC, WAT, WND, SUN, GEO, SNB, WNB

notes: EIA-930 lumps combined-cycle and simple-cycle gas as one NG bucket; we cannot split.
Per-BA accuracy could be improved by using eGRID subregion-specific factors instead of national.
